positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a stylized celestial fox spirit (kitsune) silhouette, crouching amongst delicate, glowing floral elements. The composition is centered, highly symmetrical, and utilizes bold negative space. Color palette is restricted to deep indigo, matte black, and luminous gold accents. Art style is contemporary, clean graphic design, reminiscent of Japanese Ukiyo-e linework mixed with modern etching. The fox has ethereal whiskers and flowing, stylized tails. The surrounding florals should incorporate abstract geometric patterns and bioluminescent gradients. High contrast, perfect for direct printing on dark fabric, isolated on a transparent-like background.
